arts.ttl: Ruud van Nistelrooy open to Leicester City flop leaving in January
arts.sum: Ruud van Nistelrooy may need to make a big decision at Leicester City just days after his arrival at the King Power Stadium as the Foxes consider terminating Odsonne Edouard’s loan deal. The Dutch coach has replaced Steve Cooper at Leicester after the Premier League outfit experienced a slow start to the 2024/25 campaign. arts.ttl: Leicester City v West Ham United: Premier League – live
arts.sum: Premier League updates from the 8.15pm GMT kick-off Live scoreboard | Read Football Daily | And mail Scott The goal stands! Vardy goes racing off to celebrate, belatedly, and the King Power roars! Not a bad start to the Van Nistelrooy era, huh? 3 min: … but VAR are checking it, because Mavropanos might have been playing Vardy onside. This is going to be very tight. In fact, the naked eye suggests this goal will stand. But we await the rulers. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Leicester City team news v West Ham as Ruud van Nistelrooy names first line-up
arts.sum: City (4-2-3-1): Hermansen; Justin, Coady, Vestergaard, Kristiansen; Ndidi, Soumare; Buonanotte, El Khannouss, McAteer; Vardy. Wout Faes has been dropped for the first time this season as new manager Ruud van Nistelrooy makes three changes for his maiden Leicester City line-up.

arts.ttl: Julen Lopetegui future: West Ham ready to move for x3 league winner
arts.sum: Julen Lopetegui’s future at West Ham has come under increasing pressure following the Hammers’ 5-2 defeat to Arsenal over the weekend as the London club eye a move for former FC Porto boss Sergio Conceicao. The Spaniard replaced David Moyes at the London Stadium during the summer after experiencing many successful years with the Scottish […] The post Julen Lopetegui future: West Ham ready to move for x3 league winner appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Van Nistelrooy already has what Cooper didn't after answering Leicester doubt
arts.sum: Ruud van Nistelrooy takes charge of his first game as Leicester City boss this evening as the Foxes welcome West Ham United to the King Power Stadium looking to ignite a new evolution in LE2. Maresca knows how vital having the fans on your side can be at Leicester and Ruud will soon understand.

arts.ttl: West Ham eyeing Massimiliano Allegri as potential Lopetegui replacement

arts.sum: West Ham are set to welcome back players tonight for our crunch showdown with Leicester City at the King Power Stadium. arts.ttl: Everton and West Ham have ‘convincing arguments’ for manager – Hammers have the advantage
arts.sum: Portuguese manager Sergio Conceiçao has receiving ‘convincing arguments’ from Everton and West Ham United but would prefer the latter if it came to a choice between the pair and even Nantes. That’s according to L’Equipe, who cover reports that Nantes are looking at the former Porto coach as a possible replacement for Antoine Kombouaré.
